description: Considerer agent step schemas. Closure emits verdict in {done, handoff-detail} for outputPhases routing (workflow.json). Optional deferred_items[] carves out out-of-scope tasks as new issues before close.

closure.consider.doc-scan.description: Work-step output schema for closure.consider.doc-scan. Intent enum must mirror the step's allowedIntents exactly (validateIntentSchemaEnums).

closure.consider.doc-verify.description: Work-step output schema for closure.consider.doc-verify. Always emits next; verdict authority lives in the terminal consider step.

closure.consider.doc-evidence.description: Work-step output schema for closure.consider.doc-evidence. Fact-gathering only: collects commit metadata for diffed paths. No verdict; always next or repeat.

closure.consider.precheck-kind-read.description: Work-step output schema for closure.consider.precheck-kind-read (RC6 K1).

closure.consider.precheck-kind-scope.description: Work-step output schema for closure.consider.precheck-kind-scope (RC6 K2).

closure.consider.description: Consider closure response — answer the issue and emit a verdict that routes phase transition.

summary.description: One-line human-readable summary of what was answered.

action.description: Closure intent. Always 'closing' for single-iteration considerer.

verdict.description: Verdict propagated to orchestrator. 'done' = answer-only completion (no code change) or implementation-unnecessary or abstract-only recommendation. 'handoff-detail' = implementation should be done AND at least one concrete anchor (file, symbol, or strategy) can be named.

final_summary.description: One-paragraph recap including verdict rationale. Handed off to downstream phase on 'handoff-detail'.

handoff_anchor.description: Concrete anchor that justifies 'handoff-detail'. At least one field MUST be a non-empty string when verdict='handoff-detail'. All MAY be null when verdict='done'.

symbol.description: Function / type / symbol to modify or add.

doc_paths_required.description: [RC4] Doc paths (docs/**, **/design*.md, agents/docs/**) mentioned in the issue body + comments. Populated by closure.consider.doc-scan. Additive / optional.

doc_diff_results.description: [RC4] Per-path diff verification result for this run. Populated by closure.consider.doc-verify. Additive / optional.

doc_evidence.description: [RC4] Commit metadata since baseline for diffed=true paths. Populated by closure.consider.doc-evidence. Fact-only (sha/date/subject/--stat); no relevance judgment. Consumed by the terminal consider step. Additive / optional.

truncated.description: True when commit enumeration hit the --max-count=20 cap (more commits may exist beyond the cap).

kind_at_triage.description: [RC6] Kind label frozen at triage time, read verbatim from .agent/climpt/out/kind_at_triage/<issue>.txt. Populated by closure.consider.precheck-kind-read. Additive / optional.

kind_boundary_violations.description: [RC6] Out-of-scope paths for the current kind_at_triage. Empty = clean. Non-empty triggers kind-boundary-clean validator failure → kind-boundary-breach retry. Populated by closure.consider.precheck-kind-scope.

deferred_items.description: Out-of-scope tasks carved off for follow-up issues. Orthogonal to verdict: valid on both 'done' and 'handoff-detail'. Orchestrator converts each entry into a new GitHub issue via outbox 'create-issue' before the current issue closes. Leave empty (default) when the current response fully covers the original scope. Do NOT fabricate specification detail here — each entry must describe a task the original issue author could have filed on their own.

title.description: Issue title. Self-contained, no reference to the parent issue number required (the runner links it back via body).

body.description: Issue body in markdown. Should restate the scope concretely so the downstream agent does not need to re-read the parent issue.

labels.description: Labels applied to the new issue. Usually 'kind:impl' or 'kind:consider'. Omit 'order:N' — the triager assigns it.

projects.description: Project bindings for the new issue. Absent = inherit parent's projects (when inheritProjectsForCreateIssue is on). Empty array = explicit opt-out (no inheritance). Non-empty array = use this explicit list, parent ignored.
